assessment_objectives.objective: cybersecurity / data privacy attributes associated with subjects by authorized individuals (or processes acting on behalf of individuals) are defined.
cybersecurity / data privacy attributes associated with objects by authorized individuals (or processes acting on behalf of individuals) are defined.
subjects requiring the association of cybersecurity / data privacy attributes by authorized individuals (or processes acting on behalf of individuals) are defined.
objects requiring the association of cybersecurity / data privacy attributes by authorized individuals (or processes acting on behalf of individuals) are defined.

authorized individuals (or processes acting on behalf of individuals) are provided with the capability to associate organization-defined cybersecurity / data privacy attributes with organization-defined subjects.

authorized individuals (or processes acting on behalf of individuals) are provided with the capability to associate organization-defined cybersecurity / data privacy attributes with organization-defined objects.
